preferred_name: Influence of external quantities expressed for density

preferred_name_ml.en: Influence of external quantities expressed for density
preferred_name_ml.fr: Influence de grandeurs externes pour la masse volumique
preferred_name_ml.de: Einfluss der externen Größen auf Dichtemessung

definition: properties characterizing the influence of external quantities for density measurement devices that are not the subject of the measurement but whose change affects the relationship between the indication and the result of the measurement

definition_ml.en: properties characterizing the influence of external quantities for density measurement devices that are not the subject of the measurement but whose change affects the relationship between the indication and the result of the measurement
definition_ml.fr: propriétés caractérisant l’influence de grandeurs externes pour des appareils de mesure de masse volumique qui ne sont pas l'objet de la mesure, mais dont le changement affecte la relation entre l’indication et le résultat de la mesure
definition_ml.de: Merkmale, die den Einfluss von externen Größen auf die Dichtemesseinrichtung kennzeichnen, die nicht Gegenstand der Messung sind, aber deren Änderung die Beziehung zwischen Messergebnis und Anzeige beeinflusst

raw_properties.MDC_P004.en: Influence of external quantities expressed for density
raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: properties characterizing the influence of external quantities for density measurement devices that are not the subject of the measurement but whose change affects the relationship between the indication and the result of the measurement

raw_properties.MDC_P004.de: Einfluss der externen Größen auf Dichtemessung
